changes: Cover: Range extended from 10 to 20 yalms.
Intervene: Now acquired at level 66 (previously level 74).
Hallowed Ground: Effects now applied earlier.
Holmgang: Effects now applied earlier.
Chaotic Cyclone: Hit detection now triggers earlier.
Dark Mind: Now also reduces physical damage taken by 10%.
Living Dead: Effects now applied earlier.
Abyssal Drain: Cure potency increased from 200 to 500.
Carve and Spit: Additional effect 'Restores own HP' added with cure potency of 500.
Bloodspiller: Potency increased from 580 to 600.
Dark Missionary: Now acquired at level 66 (previously level 76); now also reduces physical damage taken by 5%.
Scarlet Delirium: Potency increased from 600 to 620.
Comeuppance: Potency increased from 700 to 720.
Torcleaver: Potency increased from 800 to 820.
Aurora: Cure potency increased from 200 to 300.
Superbolide: Effects now applied earlier; no longer reduces HP to 1, instead reduces HP to 50% of maximum.
Heart of Light: Now also reduces physical damage taken by 5%.
Hypervelocity: Potency reduced from 180 to 160.
Melee Mastery II: Potency increase changed from 220 to 200.
Double Down: Cartridge cost reduced from 2 to 1.
Piercing Talon: Trait Lance Mastery now increases potency from 150 to 200; effect Enhanced Piercing Talon added (increases potency to 350).
Elusive Jump: Additional effect 'Grants Enhanced Piercing Talon' added with 15-second duration.
Geirskogul: Stacks of Nastrond Ready granted reduced from 3 to 1.
Mirage Dive: Potency increased from 200 to 380.
Nastrond: Potency increased from 300 to 600; trait Lance Mastery III potency increase changed from 360 to 720.
Stardiver: Potency increased from 620 to 720; trait Melee Mastery potency increase changed from 720 to 820.
Starcross: Range increased from 3 to 20 yalms; potency increased from 900 to 1,000.
Throwing Dagger: Trait Melee Mastery II now increases potency from 120 to 200.
Dream Within a Dream: Potency increased from 150 to 180.
Dokumori: Attack changed from single target to a cone (300 potency to first target, 25% less for remaining).
Ten Chi Jin: Players can now move while under the effect.
Tenri Jindo: Hit detection now triggers earlier.
Hissatsu: Gyoten: Recast time reduced from 10 to 5 seconds.
Gyofu: Potency increased from 230 to 240.
Zanshin: Potency increased from 820 to 900.
Tendo Kaeshi Setsugekka: Character motions and visual effects changed.
Arcane Circle: Circle of Sacrifice effect now also grants stacks of Immortal Sacrifice when party members land an ability.
Void Reaping, Cross Reaping, Grim Reaping: Hotbar icon no longer illuminated when remaining Lemure Shroud stacks are at 1 after learning Communio.
Executioner's Gallows: Hit detection now triggers earlier.
Heated Clean Shot: Potency increased from 140 to 160; combo potency increased from 400 to 420.
Blazing Shot: Potency increased from 220 to 240.
Flamethrower: Area of effect increased from 8 to 12 yalms; potency increased from 80 to 100.
Double Check: Potency increased from 160 to 170.
Checkmate: Potency increased from 160 to 170.
Fan Dance: Trait Dynamic Dancer now increases potency from 150 to 180.
Curing Waltz: Area of effect increased from 3 to 5 yalms.
Fan Dance III: Trait Dynamic Dancer now increases potency from 200 to 220.
Starfall Dance: Action change settings can now switch Starfall Dance with Devilment.
Flare: Cast time reduced from 4 to 3 seconds.
Ley Lines: Now a charged action with a maximum of 2 charges; cannot be executed while under the effect of Ley Lines.
Despair: Trait Enhanced Astral Fire now makes cast time instant.
Enhanced Enochian IV: Effect potency reduced from 33% to 32%.
Crimson Cyclone: Additional effect 'Grants Crimson Strike Ready' added.
Crimson Strike: No longer a combo action, requires Crimson Strike Ready effect.
Summon Ifrit II, Summon Titan II, Summon Garuda II: Potency of signature actions increased from 750 to 800.
Sunflare: Potency increased from 700 to 800.
Verflare: Potency increased from 620 to 650.
Verholy: Potency increased from 620 to 650.
Scorch: Potency increased from 700 to 750.
Resolution: Potency increased from 800 to 850.
Pom Motif, Hammer Motif, Starry Sky Motif: Motif will now appear on canvas upon entering instanced duties or restarting encounters.
Starry Muse: Ground effect will no longer appear when battle effects are set to Show Limited.
Esuna: Cast time made instant.
Holy: Cast time reduced from 2.5 to 1.5 seconds.
Asylum: Visual effects indicating area of effect adjusted.
Glare III: Potency increased from 330 to 340.
Holy III: Cast time reduced from 2.5 to 1.5 seconds.
Afflatus Misery: Potency increased from 1,320 to 1,360.
Divine Caress: Area of effect increased from 15 to 30 yalms.
Embrace: Cure potency increased from 150 to 180.
Adloquium: MP cost reduced from 1,000 to 900.
Succor: MP cost reduced from 1,000 to 900.
Seraphic Veil: Cure potency increased from 150 to 180.
Concitation: MP cost reduced from 1,000 to 900.
Manifestation: MP cost reduced from 1,000 to 900.
Accession: MP cost reduced from 1,000 to 900.
Gravity: Area of effect increased from 5 to 8 yalms.
Gravity II: Area of effect increased from 5 to 8 yalms.
Prognosis: MP cost reduced from 800 to 700.
Eukrasian Diagnosis: MP cost reduced from 900 to 800.
Eukrasian Prognosis: MP cost reduced from 900 to 800.
Dosis III: Potency increased from 360 to 370.
Toxikon II: Potency increased from 360 to 370.
Pneuma: Potency increased from 360 to 370.
Eukrasian Prognosis II: MP cost reduced from 900 to 800.
Philosophia: Area of effect increased from 20 to 30 yalms.

new_content.name: Jeuno: The First Walk
new_content.description: A new alliance raid dungeon where the worlds of FINAL FANTASY XI and XIV collide.

new_content.name: Yuweyawata Field Station
new_content.description: A new dungeon for Disciples of War or Magic level 100.

new_content.name: The Minstrel's Ballad: Sphene's Burden
new_content.description: A new trial accessible via the Raid Finder.

new_content.name: The Jade Stoa (Unreal)
new_content.description: A new unreal trial available in the Raid Finder.

new_content.name: An Otherworldly Encounter
new_content.description: New Chronicles of a New Era quest.

new_content.name: A Present from the Present
new_content.description: Chronicles of a New Era quest (Pandæmonium: Epilogue).

new_content.name: An Intrepid New Enterprise
new_content.description: First main quest for the Pelupelu allied society.

new_content.name: Pelupelu Allied Society Quests
new_content.description: New allied society quests involving daily requests and reputation building.

new_content.name: Duty Support
new_content.description: Added support for Halatali and Yuweyawata Field Station.

new_content.name: Outfit Glamour
new_content.description: New feature allowing players to condense sets of gear into single slots in the glamour dresser.

new_content.name: Hall of the Novice (Tactical Training)
new_content.description: New training exercises added to familiarize players with battle mechanics.

new_content.name: Dock Poga
new_content.description: A new base of operations for the Pelupelu allied society.

housing.name: Pure White Interior Wall
housing.description: An interior wall of plain, pristine white for maximum versatility.

housing.name: Light Wood Flooring
housing.description: Flooring made from rustic planks in an unpretentious pale shade.

housing.name: Flat Ceiling Lamp
housing.description: This unobtrusive lighting fixture is ideal for those who would rather not draw attention to the ceiling.

housing.name: Square Stepping Stones
housing.description: Square stones of varying sizes, carefully placed so as to avoid crushing the flowers.

housing.name: Ja Ja Gural Tree
housing.description: Originating in the depths of Cenote Ja Ja Gural, this luminescent tree lights up your lawn quite vividly.

housing.name: Far Eastern Gazebo
housing.description: A gazebo designed in the Far Eastern fashion.

housing.name: Royal Bed
housing.description: Rumor has it a royal family in the world of Vana'diel sleeps on resplendent beds such as these.

housing.name: Classroom Chair
housing.description: This sturdy chair was built to accommodate young students throughout their educational journey.
